6TH YEAR – By my side.

┗━━━━°❀•°✮°•❀°━━━┛

It was currently your sixth year at Hogwarts, you've decided that you wanted to go sneak out and venture out into the night in the forbidden forest to gather some rare plants or flowers that can be used to decorate your secret room, thinking it was best to go alone.

But of course, you accidentally bumped into your favourite potions master, who seemingly had the same idea to sneak out to gather herbs for his potions.

(I also coded in that he works with NOTME! Have fun with whatever route you prefer. <3)
creator: Aloster_Amore
